title: Malaysian Beef Stew
description: A hearty Malaysian-inspired beef stew made with tender beef and crunchy celery. Perfect for a cold winter's night.

ingredients.name: Beef
ingredients.notes: Use beef stewing meat for the best results

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the celery and cook until slightly tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the crushed tomatoes, beef broth, browned beef, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the stew in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) for 2-3 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
